title: China urges restraint on Hormuz blockade
snippet: China warned blockade threatens global trade, called for immediate ceasefire. Chinese FM: root cause is military conflict. China gets 1/3 of oil via Hormuz, has ~1B barrels reserve. Open Hormuz crucial for global interests.
tag_reason: New Chinese diplomatic response to blockade. Previously China mentioned only in context of 50% tariff threat and UN veto.
